allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('META ADS:', 'OK' if len\(d.get\('taskResult',''\)\)>200 else 'FAIL'\); print\('CHAT:', d.get\('chatResponse',''\)[:80]\)")
